text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Impact of a projectile in Kiryat Shmona, northern Israel, from Hezbollah that hadn't triggered alerts. No injuries have been reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区及纳哈里亚周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 真主党发射的一枚炮弹击中以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳，该袭击未触发警报。目前暂无人员伤亡报告。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 KAN News: Netanyahu Changes Strike Policy in Lebanon – Personal Approval Needed for Any Operation in Beirut
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 KAN新闻：内塔尼亚胡改变对黎巴嫩的打击政策——在贝鲁特的任何行动均需获得其个人批准

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan : Following a request from U.S. President Trump, Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu has changed Israel’s strike policy in Lebanon. Each strike in Beirut now requires a different approval process and is subject to the prime minister’s personal authorisation. An Israeli source said there is no ceasefire, but there has been a “very significant reduction” in strikes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：应美国总统特朗普的要求，以色列总理内塔尼亚胡改变了以色列在黎巴嫩的打击政策。现在，贝鲁特的每一次打击都需要经过不同的审批程序，并须经总理个人授权。以色列消息人士称，目前尚未停火，但打击次数已“显著减少”。@wfwitness

text: 🚢 Six weeks into the war, the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed. Bloomberg vessel tracking data shows traffic collapsed from ~50 ships per day to near zero on February 28, and has barely recovered despite the ceasefire announcement. Most recent crossings are limited to Iran-linked vessels. Normal daily traffic: ~135 ships. Current: near zero. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🚢 战争进入第六周，霍尔木兹海峡实际上仍处于关闭状态。彭博社的船舶追踪数据显示，交通量从每天约50艘船骤降至2月28日接近零，尽管宣布了停火，但几乎没有恢复。最近的过境船只仅限于与伊朗有关的船只。正常每日交通量：约135艘。当前：接近零。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Iran’s National Oil Refining and Distribution Company announced that the Lavan Island oil refinery facilities were attacked around 10am on Wednesday. Firefighting and safety teams are working to control the blaze. No casualties have been reported…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 A fire is still ongoing at the Lavan refinery in Iran. Satellite imagery taken today confirms the destruction of 2-4 fuel tanks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 伊朗国家炼油和分销公司宣布，拉万岛炼油厂设施于周三上午10点左右遭到袭击。消防和安全小组正在努力控制火势。目前暂无人员伤亡报告……” ⚡ 🇮🇷 伊朗拉万炼油厂的火灾仍在持续。今天拍摄的卫星图像证实有2-4个燃料储罐被毁。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed: Lebanon will request a ceasefire during talks with the Israeli ambassador in Washington Yechiel Leiter this evening, as a goodwill gesture to begin negotiations. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Diplomatic sources to Al-Jadeed on a ceasefire: No final ceasefire, but a de-escalation in Beirut while the Israeli military situation in southern Lebanon remains unchanged @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 《新阿拉伯人报》：黎巴嫩将在今晚与以色列驻华盛顿大使耶希尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）的会谈中请求停火，作为开启谈判的善意姿态。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 外交消息人士向Al-Jadeed透露关于停火的消息：目前没有最终停火，但贝鲁特的局势有所缓和，而以色列在黎巴嫩南部的军事态势保持不变。@wfwitness

text: Zohran Mamdani on Iran War: At the heart of any war is dehumanization. And dehumanization never stays confined to the war. When you normalize killing abroad, you normalize cruelty at home. This is the dehumanization we are allowing to spread in our country. A young Muslim woman was attacked on a subway platform. Her attacker said, ‘I wonder how many Iranians we killed today.’
text_zh: 佐兰·马姆达尼（Zohran Mamdani）谈伊朗战争：任何战争的核心都是非人化。而非人化永远不会局限于战争本身。当你使国外的杀戮正常化时，你也就使国内的残忍正常化了。这就是我们任由其在我们国家蔓延的非人化。一名年轻的穆斯林女性在地铁站台上遭到袭击。袭击者说：“我想知道我们今天杀了多少伊朗人。”

text: Zohran Mamdani on Iran War: We are speaking about a war that has killed thousands of civilians. We are spending tens of billions of dollars to kill people. Money that could be making life easier for working people. The things we’re told are unrealistic would cost a fraction of this war. We always seem to have money for war, but not to feed the poor.
text_zh: 佐兰·马姆达尼（Zohran Mamdani）谈伊朗战争：我们谈论的是一场已经夺去数千名平民生命的战争。我们正在花费数百亿美元去杀人。这些钱本可以改善劳动人民的生活。那些被告知不切实际的事情，其成本仅为这场战争的一小部分。我们似乎总是有钱打仗，却没钱救济穷人。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 Donald Trump signaled that peace talks with Iran may collapse, following his latest remarks: 📌 “Iranians are far better at handling fake news and public relations than they are at fighting.” 📌 “It seems they don’t realize they hold no real leverage, aside from short-term blackmail of the world through international shipping routes. The only reason they are still in this position is because negotiations are ongoing.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普在最新言论中暗示与伊朗的和平谈判可能会破裂：📌 “伊朗人在处理假新闻和公共关系方面比在战斗方面要强得多。” 📌 “他们似乎没有意识到，除了通过国际航运路线对世界进行短期勒索外，他们没有任何真正的筹码。他们之所以还能处于这个位置，仅仅是因为谈判仍在进行中。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: OSINTdefender In the ongoing back and forth between Iranian and U.S. decision-makers over the terms of the ceasefire and future negotiations frameworks, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has claimed that Iran holds no cards in the negotiations, despite Iran actively holding the Strait of Hormuz hostage. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：在伊朗和美国决策者就停火条款和未来谈判框架进行的持续博弈中，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普声称伊朗在谈判中没有任何筹码，尽管伊朗目前实际上将霍尔木兹海峡作为人质。推文

text: ELINT News RT @LucasFoxNews : Kuwait reporting more Iranian drone attacks: بيان رقم (59) صادر عن المتحدث الرسمي لوزارة الدفاع العقيد الركن سعود عبدالعزيز العطوان رصدت القوات المسلحة وتعاملت خلال الـ (24) ساعة الماضية مع عدد (7) طائراتٍ مسيّرةٍ معادية داخل المجال الجوي الكويتي، وتم التعامل معها وفق الإجراءات المعتمدة. وقد نتج عن العدوان الإيراني الآثم استهداف عددٍ من المنشآت الحيوية تابعة للحرس الوطني، ما أسفر عن إصابة عددٍ من منتسبيه، وهم يتلقون العلاج حاليًا، وحالتهم مستقرة، بالإضافة إلى أضرارٍ مادية جسيمة. كما تعاملت مجموعة التفتيش والتخلص من المتفجرات التابعة لهندسة القوة البرية مع عدد (14) بلاغًا، وذلك وفق الإجراءات المعتمدة. ويواصل منتسبو القوات المسلحة أداء واجبهم الوطني بروحٍ معنويةٍ عالية وانضباطٍ راسخ، مجسدين التزامهم الثابت بحماية الوطن وصون أمنه واستقراره، ومؤكدين جاهزيتهم المستمرة لتنفيذ المهام والواجبات بكل كفاءة . #الجيش_الكويتي - KUWAIT ARMY - الجيش الكويتي tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @LucasFoxNews：科威特报告更多伊朗无人机袭击：国防部发言人萨乌德·阿卜杜勒阿齐兹·阿勒阿特万（Saud Abdulaziz Al-Atwan）上校发表第（59）号声明，武装部队在过去（24）小时内监测并处理了（7）架进入科威特领空的敌方无人机，并已根据既定程序进行了处置。伊朗的罪恶侵略导致国民警卫队的一些设施成为目标，造成多名人员受伤，他们目前正在接受治疗，情况稳定，此外还造成了严重的物质损失。陆军工程部的爆炸物检查和处置小组也根据既定程序处理了（14）起报告。武装部队人员继续以高昂的士气和坚定的纪律履行其国家职责，体现了他们保护祖国、维护安全与稳定的坚定承诺，并确认随时准备以最高效率执行任务。#科威特军队 - KUWAIT ARMY - 科威特军队 推文

text: 🇮🇷 Sayyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei: — In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. The news of the martyrdom of the prominent professor in the fields of science and culture, and the veteran figure in the field of foreign policy, Dr. Sayyed Kamal Kharrazi, was a badge of honor for the academic community, university professors, and political officials in the Islamic Republic system, and conversely, a mark of shame indicating the baseness of the arrogant american-zionist powers and enemies of science, culture, and Iranian civilization. The deceased spent many years of his life in the service of various cultural and media fields, and in bearing the responsibility of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs. He also undertook a role in the Strategic Council on Foreign Relations, alongside his activity in the fields of modern cognitive sciences. As I offer my condolences and congratulations on the martyrdom of this dedicated figure and his honorable wife to the general public, the academic community, the lovers of this professor and his students, as well as the honorable Kharrazi family, especially His Eminence Ayatollah Sayyed Mohsen Kharrazi, I ask the Almighty Allah to grant them high ranks. Sayyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei | 11/04/2026
text_zh: 🇮🇷 赛义德·穆杰塔巴·侯赛尼·哈梅内伊：— 以至仁至慈的真主之名。著名科学文化教授、外交领域资深人士赛义德·卡迈勒·哈拉齐（Sayyed Kamal Kharrazi）博士殉难的消息，是伊斯兰共和国体系学术界、大学教授和政治官员的荣誉勋章，反之，则是傲慢的美国-犹太复国主义势力以及科学、文化和伊朗文明敌人的卑劣耻辱。逝者一生中多年服务于各种文化和媒体领域，并承担了外交部的责任。他还在战略外交关系委员会中担任职务，同时活跃于现代认知科学领域。在向广大公众、学术界、这位教授的爱戴者及其学生，以及尊贵的哈拉齐家族，特别是赛义德·穆赫辛·哈拉齐（Sayyed Mohsen Kharrazi）大阿亚图拉，致以哀悼和祝贺的同时，我祈求全能的真主赐予他们崇高的地位。赛义德·穆杰塔巴·侯赛尼·哈梅内伊 | 2026年11月4日

text: NEW: After a call with Trump, Netanyahu changed Israel’s strike policy in Lebanon. From now on, every strike in Beirut requires special approvals — including Netanyahu’s personal sign-off. An Israeli official says there is no ceasefire, but attacks have been significantly reduced and are now under tighter political restrictions. Source: KAN
text_zh: 最新消息：在与特朗普通话后，内塔尼亚胡改变了以色列在黎巴嫩的打击政策。从现在起，贝鲁特的每一次打击都需要特别批准——包括内塔尼亚胡的个人签字。一位以色列官员表示，目前尚未停火，但袭击已显著减少，且现在受到更严格的政治限制。来源：KAN

text: NEW: After a call with Trump, Netanyahu changed Israel’s strike policy in Lebanon. From now on, every strike in Beirut requires special approvals — including Netanyahu’s personal sign-off. An Israeli official says there is no ceasefire, but attacks have been significantly reduced and are now under tighter political restrictions. Source: KAN

text: Ukrainian kamikaze drones hit Russia’s Rakushnoye and Yuri Korchagin drilling platforms in the Caspian Sea, over 1,000 km from the front line. The drones were guided via Starlink. Despite light air-defense systems on the platforms, the attack was not repelled.
text_zh: 代理市长阿尔乔姆·科布扎尔表示，乌克兰神风特攻队无人机袭击了俄罗斯在里海的拉库什诺耶（Rakushnoye）和尤里·科尔恰金（Yuri Korchagin）钻井平台，距离前线超过1000公里。无人机通过星链（Starlink）进行引导。尽管平台上有轻型防空系统，但袭击并未被击退。

text: Middle East Expert Adam Weinstein (Quincy Institute) The reason Iranians are negotiating is because they’ve sustained a lot of damage. They want to monetize the Strait of Hormuz and be able to sell their oil. They trust the leverage they have over Hormuz - not the Americans. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 中东专家亚当·温斯坦（Adam Weinstein，昆西研究所）：伊朗人之所以进行谈判，是因为他们遭受了巨大的损失。他们希望将霍尔木兹海峡货币化并能够出售石油。他们相信自己对霍尔木兹海峡的控制力——而不是美国人。完整采访

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇵🇱 The US administration has given permission for the integration of AIM-120C AMRAAM air-to-air missiles with Polish FA-50PL light fighters. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2042636988071678199/video/1 tweet

text: WarTranslated Ukraine will finish repairing the Druzhba pipeline this spring to unlock €90 billion in aid frozen by Hungary, Zelensky says. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰将在今年春天完成对友谊输油管道的修复，以解锁被匈牙利冻结的900亿欧元援助。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the Iranians are better at handling the “Fake News Media” and “Public Relations” than they are at fighting. @wfwitness

text: Trump: The Iranians are better at handling the Fake News Media, and “Public Relations,” than they are at fighting!
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗人在处理假新闻媒体和“公共关系”方面比在战斗方面要强得多！

text: BREAKING: Trump: The Iranians don’t seem to realize they have no cards, other than a short term extortion of the World by using International Waterways. The only reason they are alive today is to negotiate!
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：伊朗人似乎没有意识到，除了利用国际水道对世界进行短期勒索外，他们没有任何筹码。他们今天还能活着仅仅是为了谈判！

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump: The Iranians don’t seem to realize they have no cards, other than a short term extortion of the World by using International Waterways. The only reason they are alive today is to negotiate! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇦🇷 U.S. Bureau of Western Hemisphere Affairs: We know who our friends are. At a pivotal time in the conflict, Argentina took the bold step of designating the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corp (IRGC) and expelling Mohsen Soltani Tehrani, Iran's representative in Argentina. We appreciate Argentina standing firm against terrorism and Iran's threats, and for its clear and unequivocal stance throughout this conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇦🇷 美国西半球事务局：我们知道谁是我们的朋友。在冲突的关键时刻，阿根廷采取了大胆的步骤，将伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）列为恐怖组织，并驱逐了伊朗驻阿根廷代表穆赫辛·索尔塔尼·德黑兰尼（Mohsen Soltani Tehrani）。我们感谢阿根廷在反恐和应对伊朗威胁方面的坚定立场，以及在整个冲突期间所表现出的明确且毫不含糊的态度。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 Al Jadeed: Lebanese President Nawaf Salam will meet UN Secretary‑General António Guterres on Tuesday in New York, and U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday in Washington. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 Al Jadeed：黎巴嫩总统纳瓦夫·萨拉姆（Nawaf Salam）将于周二在纽约会见联合国秘书长古特雷斯，并于周四在华盛顿会见美国国务卿马尔科·卢比奥。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ "WORLD’S MOST POWERFUL RESET!!!" - Trump Announces His Daily Delusion Schedule
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ “世界上最强大的重置！！！” - 特朗普宣布他的每日妄想时间表

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese political figures opposed to Hezbollah are calling on the Beirut government to open peace negotiations with Israel, according to the Lebanese newspaper Nidaa al-Watan. The officials called for a small negotiating delegation free from sectarian constraints, a unilateral ceasefire declaration to Hezbollah with a short timeline for disarmament, and outreach to Arab states and the Vatican to build diplomatic support. A Lebanese official told the paper the government is the only body authorized to negotiate with Israel and said Lebanon should "copy the Pakistani model", demand a limited ceasefire and begin talks immediately after it takes effect. The paper also reports that negotiations between U.S., Israeli, and Lebanese ambassadors will begin Tuesday in Washington, with follow-up talks expected in Cyprus. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：据黎巴嫩《祖国呼声报》（Nidaa al-Watan）报道，反对真主党的黎巴嫩政治人物呼吁贝鲁特政府与以色列开启和平谈判。官员们呼吁组建一个不受宗派限制的小型谈判代表团，向真主党宣布单方面停火并设定短期解除武装的时间表，并与阿拉伯国家和梵蒂冈接触以建立外交支持。一位黎巴嫩官员告诉该报，政府是唯一有权与以色列谈判的机构，并表示黎巴嫩应该“复制巴基斯坦模式”，要求有限停火并在停火生效后立即开始谈判。该报还报道称，美国、以色列和黎巴嫩大使之间的谈判将于周二在华盛顿开始，后续会谈预计将在塞浦路斯举行。推文

text: Open Source Intel Major (res.) Nirit Rokach, wounded while defending Kibbutz Urim on October 7, has been selected as one of representatives at the IDF at Israel’s 78th Independence Day torch-lighting ceremony. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042635211838558497/photo/1 tweet
